creator: pfeifer@dbai.tuwien.ac.at
text:
Please close this PR.

The submitter confirmed that my patch in PR/20951 indeed also fixes the
problem he reported for 3.5. (Thanks for checking, James!)

Thus my patches in PR/20951 are known to work fine on at least 3.5 and
4.1 and they should be installed ASAP, regardless of possible problems
with -CURRENT (which also was broken before these patches according to
bento).

Gerald
